title: ReviewCompletion
description: Output schema for /second-opinion review completions (v1.9.8). The runner passes this to `codex exec --output-schema` AND independently verifies the output via jq because --output-schema is documented to be silently dropped under two conditions (openai/codex#4181 codex-family gating; #15451 MCP-active ignore). OpenAI strict response_format requires: (1) additionalProperties:false at every object level, (2) `required` to enumerate every key in `properties` AT EVERY LEVEL. v1.9.3 fixed findings.items.required but missed the ROOT required, leaving summary/codex_model/codex_session_uuid out — same bug class, half-fixed. v1.9.8 closes the gap. Our jq verify_conformance still only enforces the semantically-required 6 (id, severity, failure_mode, evidence, required_fix, test) per finding — the other API-required fields (category, affected_invariant, location, summary, codex_model, codex_session_uuid) exist for strict-mode contract compliance only.

scope_hash.description: lowercase hex sha256 of canonical-form scope inputs
